It's in a confirmed Stage 2 uptrend and has formed a VCP with 3 contractions (tightest: 1.9%) — the textbook pre-breakout coiling that Minervini built his career on. The RS line is at new highs — this stock is leading the market, not just riding it. With earnings 7 days away, this is in the optimal pre-earnings catalyst window. Strong growth stocks often run 10-20% into their report. Trade setup: entry at $112.06, stop at $103.10 (–8%), target $134.47 (+20%). Risk/reward: 2.5:1.
key_strengths: confirmed Stage 2 uptrend (price $112.06 above MA50 $107 and MA200 $92)
VCP pattern with 3 contractions, tightest pullback 1.9% — classic coiled-spring setup
extremely tight base (sub-5% contraction) — high-velocity breakout potential
Relative Strength line at new highs vs S&P 500 — institutional accumulation leading price
what_to_watch: sell at least half position before earnings to avoid binary event risk
RSI at 62 — momentum healthy, watch for RSI to stay above 50 on any pullback
price is just 1.7% from 52-week high at $113.95 — that level is key resistance/breakout point
